title: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2, Total Holdings Now 43,000 BTC
summary: Metaplanet, a Japanese company, purchased 2,823 bitcoin in Q2 2026, spending $222 million. This brings their total bitcoin holdings to 43,000 BTC, the largest corporate stash outside of MicroStrategy.
body:
Metaplanet, a Japanese company focused on bitcoin acquisition, has added 2,823 bitcoin to its holdings in the second quarter of 2026. The company spent $222 million on the purchase, averaging $78,608 per bitcoin. This acquisition brings Metaplanet's total bitcoin holdings to 43,000 BTC, making it one of the largest corporate holders of bitcoin, second only to MicroStrategy.

The purchase was made at an average price of $78,608 per bitcoin, reflecting the company's strategy of accumulating bitcoin regardless of short-term price fluctuations. Metaplanet has been steadily increasing its bitcoin holdings, demonstrating a long-term commitment to the asset. The company's total investment in bitcoin now stands at over $3.3 billion, based on the average purchase price.

This move is significant for everyday investors as it underscores the growing institutional confidence in bitcoin. Large-scale acquisitions by companies like Metaplanet can influence market sentiment and potentially drive up the price of bitcoin. For individual investors, this could mean increased interest and investment in bitcoin, as well as greater mainstream acceptance.

Metaplanet's continued investment in bitcoin highlights the asset's growing role in corporate treasuries. As more companies follow suit, we may see a shift in how bitcoin is perceived and used in the financial world. Investors should watch for further announcements from Metaplanet and other major players in the bitcoin market, as these can provide insights into the asset's future trajectory.
twitterThread: Metaplanet just added 2,823 bitcoin to its stash, bringing its total to 43,000 BTC. That's a $222M bet on bitcoin's future.
The Japanese company spent an average of $78,608 per bitcoin, showing no signs of slowing down its accumulation. This is the 2nd largest corporate bitcoin stash after MicroStrategy.

Why does this matter? Big players like Metaplanet investing heavily in bitcoin can boost market confidence and drive up prices. Keep an eye on their next move. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-02-metaplanet-adds-2823-bitcoin-in-q2-total-holdings-now-43000-btc
